NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: PASI 90 response at week 10-16 (primary timepoint) — odds ratio (OR scale preferred over RR at low placebo rates)
NMA_CONFIG.note: EXPANDED NETWORK v1.2: Adds UNCOVER-2, UNCOVER-3, FIXTURE, BE VIVID (bime vs placebo + adalimumab), BE SURE (bime vs adalimumab). k now = 10. Uses OR scale (preferred to RR when placebo response rate is near-zero; Sbidian 2023 Cochrane convention). Active-comparator nodes (adalimumab, etanercept, ustekinumab) provide extra triangulation.

title: RapidMeta Dermatology | IL-17 / IL-23 Biologics NMA in Plaque Psoriasis v1.5
